description: Both lower and upper split segments have alignment tabs at the same Z=0 location. When assembled, tabs occupy the same physical volume.
why_it_matters: Split sections are designed to be bolted together. If tabs collide, the joint cannot be assembled. This is impossible geometry, not a fit risk.
recommended_action:
Redesign _split_section() so only one segment has a tab and the other has a matching slot. Remove the tab from the upper segment.
